titleStmt.title: SII 15.140: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 140. (B.K. No. 11 of 1926-27.) GADAG, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab built into the prākāra wall of the Trikūṭeśvara temple.

This is dated the 5th regnal year of the king, Krōdhi, Mārgaśira-amāvāse, Monday, solar eclipse, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkramaṇa. The only solar eclipse of the year occurred in the month of Kārttika, corresponding to 1184 A.D., November 5, Monday. The recorded date corresponds to 1184 A.D., December 3, Monday, f.d.t. °96. But the solar eclipse did not occur that day. On neither of these days did Uttarāyaṇasaṅkrānti occur.

The epigraph registers a gift of land by Yōgi Sahajānanda, disciple of Rudraśakti, to the god Svayaṁbhu Mādhavēśvara of Kratupura, for worship and offerings and for feeding the Brāhmaṇas. The gift land was purchased from Seventy-two Mahājanas of the place who are praised for their learning and religious acts. It also describes Mahādēva-nāyaka of Agastya gōtra and registers a few more gifts to the same deity. The inscription is partly damaged.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbi caṁdracāmara cāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbha mūla
staṁbhāyaśaṁbhavē . svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabhaṁ
mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭāraka kāḷaṁjara puravarādhīśvaraṁ suva¨rṇna vṟiṣabhadhvaja
ḍamarugatū¨ryyani¨rgghōpaṇaṁ kaḷacu¨ryyakuḷakamaḷamā¨rttaṁḍa kadanapracaṁḍa mānakana
kācaḷaṁ subhaṭarāditya . śanivārasiddhi [giridu¨rgga]malla gajasāmanta śaraṇāgate vajrapaṁ
jara pratāpalaṁkēśvara paranārīsahōdara nāmādi samastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmatsa ṁkama
dēvarasaravijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhiprava¨rddhamānamācaṁdrā¨rkkatāraṁbaraṁsalu
ttamire . © svasti yamaniyame svādhyāya dhyānadhāraṇa
kararuṁ catu¨rvvēdādi madhyāvasānānūnapadavinūtaru sakeḷa tarulavaṇā ṁbhō
dhiparīta viprakuḷaviḷasitāṁbaravaḷayaruṁ svadha¨rma dha¨rmmānu guṇagaṇamaṇi vi
bhūṣaṇaru duhitanihita bhīṣaṇaru pāṁḍavakuḷatiḷaka jana yāgō pā¨rjji
taru tanmakhā¨rgghyāgrapūjō¨rjjitaru nikhiḷāvani rājita padā
¨rtthavirājitaru kavi gamaki vādi vāgmi catu¨rvvidhābhīṣṭa mīmāṁsā¨rttha
pratiṣṭhitavidaru Aśvamēdhasaṁsthāvabhṛtāvagāha brahmavaṁ
śōdbhavaru ṣaḍāṁgavini taru śrī svayaṁbhu tri ppa śrīmatu
neppadiṁbaru sabāḷavṛddha¨rnneredi¨rddu dha¨rmmāṁga svasti śrī
madagastyagōtrapavitraruṁ sujanaikamitraruṁ baṁdhujanaru bhī
taruṁ sakaḷa jagatukhyātaruṁ bhuvanavikhyātaru mānōṁnata
ḷdarantumalladeyuṁ tadgōtrapavitranuṁ ni¨rmmaḷavikhyātanuṁ sujanaikamitranuṁ saka ḷā¨rtthi
nōraṁjananumenisi negaḷpīśvaranāyakanudiyisidaṁ Ātena maga mahādēvanāyaka svakuḷa
yaṁ pe¨rccesuvasudhāmarīciyuṁ vibudhajana cūḍāmaṇi yenisinegaḷda naṁtu
svasti samastavastuvistārabyāpisamyajñānalōcanaruṁ triḷōcana dhyānaikaparā yaṇaru puru
ttamābhidhāna paramayō(ṁ)gīṁdra prasādāsādhitajñānaiśva¨ryyasaṁpaṁna rudraśakti dēva
sani¨rmmaḷa manassarōjātaruṁ bhuvanavikhyātarumappa śrīmad yōgisahajānaṁda dēvaru śrīmatu
kaḷacu¨ryya cakrava¨rtti nissaṁka saṁkamadēvava¨rśada 5 neya krōdhi saṁvatsarada mā¨rgga śiradamūvāsa sōmavā
rasū¨ryyagrahaṇamuttarāyaṇasaṁkrāṁti vyatīpātadaṁdu śrīmatu kratupuradeppa diṁbaraṁ su
va¨rṇnapūjeyiṁ pūjisiyavara kaiyalu sa¨rvvabādhaparihārasa[¨rvva]namasyavāgipaḍedu śrīdakṣiṇavā
raṇāsi śrī svayaṁbhu mādhavēśvara dēvara mūṭakūṭa prāsādakkaṁ nityanivēdya nandādī vi
tra paitrakaṁ paṁni¨rvva brāhmaṇara grāsake biṭṭa mattaru 45 ṟa sīme yeṁteṁdaḍe haṁdigō ḷa
riyiṁ teṁka gadugina holadiṁpaḍuvalu haṟakāṟa gēṇigeyiṁ baḍagalu kattalevāḷa
ladiṁ mūḍalu yiṁtidake nālku gōṭinalu kavile kattigeya liṁgalāṁcchana kallu pu
riyiṁ mūḍalu maneyoṁdu yī dha¨rmmamaṁ nōḍi śaraṇāgatavajrapaṁjararappa śrīmade ppadiṁ
baruṁ samasta nagaraṁgaḷuṁ neredu hoṟagiṁda baṁda bhattakka gobbara yeḷḷiṁge
na gāṇadalu soṁṭage yeṇneya gaḍiyalu soṭige yaṁṇe yiṁtīdha¨rmmamaṁ pratipāḷisi
raṇāsiyoḷu sāyira kavileya kōḍu koḷaguṁ suva¨rṇnadalu kaṭṭesi catu¨rvvēdapā
rappa brāhmaṇarige koṭṭu kratuśata maneydugu ḷidātavāraṇāsiyo
kavileyaṁ rāmēśvaradoḷekkōṭi tapōdhanaruma gurukṣētradalu vēdapāragarappa brāhma
ḷida mahāpātakanakku . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharāṁ saṣṭi¨rvva
[¨rṣa] . sahasrāṇāṁ viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimi .
Digital edition of SII 15.140 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
